name: Mrigank Kishore Varma
title: Principal Cloud Architect | AI/ML | Cloud Transformation
tagline: Designing scalable, cost-efficient, AI-driven cloud systems

achievements: Led cloud transformation reducing TCO by 80%
Implemented AI/ML systems for document processing
Optimized data pipelines from hours to minutes
Reduced cloud costs by 80% through optimization
Optimized data pipelines from hours to minutes
Implemented AI/ML solutions including OCR, NLP, and ETA prediction

projects.name: Cloud Migration Platform
projects.problem: Manual cloud migration processes were time-consuming and error-prone
projects.solution: Built automated platform using AWS services and Terraform
projects.impact: Reduced migration time by 70% and improved reliability

projects.name: Internal Developer Platform
projects.problem: Teams struggled with inconsistent development environments
projects.solution: Created self-service platform with Kubernetes and CI/CD

projects.name: AI-based Document Processing System
projects.problem: Manual document processing was slow and costly
projects.solution: Implemented OCR and NLP using AWS SageMaker

projects.name: Real-time Data Pipeline
projects.problem: Data processing took hours, delaying insights
projects.solution: Built real-time pipeline with Apache Kafka and Spark
projects.impact: Reduced processing time to minutes, enabling real-time analytics

chatbot_responses.what does he do: Mrigank is a Principal Cloud Architect specializing in cloud transformation, AI/ML, and scalable system design.
chatbot_responses.what are his skills: He has expertise in Cloud (AWS, Azure, Kubernetes), Data & AI (Glue, Spark, SageMaker), DevOps (CI/CD, GitHub Actions), and Programming (Python, Java, TypeScript).
chatbot_responses.explain his aws experience: With 16+ years in IT, Mrigank has extensive AWS experience including cloud migrations, landing zone design, and AI/ML implementations using services like SageMaker and Glue.
chatbot_responses.what ai work has he done: He has implemented AI/ML solutions including OCR for document processing, NLP for text analysis, and predictive models for ETA estimation using TensorFlow and AWS services.
